        have h₁₀ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (2 ^ j + 1) - 3) ∣ 2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3 ∧ Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (2 ^ j + 1) - 3) ∣ 3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3 := ⟨h₉, h₈⟩
        have h₁₁ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (2 ^ j + 1) - 3) ∣ Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3) := Nat.dvd_gcd h₉ h₈
        have h₁₂ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3) = 1 := by
          have h₁₃ : 2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := by
            rw [Int.ModEq]
            exact Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero.mpr (by
              simp [Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero]
              exact Int.dvd_of_nat_dvd (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _))
          have h₁₄ : 3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := by
            rw [Int.ModEq]
            exact Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero.mpr (by
              simp [Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero]
              exact Int.dvd_of_nat_dvd (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _))
          have h₁₅ : 2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] → 3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] → Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3) = 1 := by
            intro h₁₃ h₁₄
            have h₁₆ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3) ∣ 3 - 3 := by
              have h₁₇ : 2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := h₁₃
              have h₁₈ : 3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) ≡ 3 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := h₁₄
              have h₁₉ : 3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3 ≡ 0 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := by
                simpa [Int.ModEq, Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero] using h₁₈
              have h₂₀ : 2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3 ≡ 0 [ZMOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3)] := by
                simpa [Int.ModEq, Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero] using h₁₇
              omega
            omega
          exact h₁₅ h₁₃ h₁₄
        have h₁₃ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (2 ^ j + 1) - 3) ∣ 1 := by
          calc
            Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (2 ^ j + 1) - 3) ∣ Nat.gcd (2 ^ (2 ^ i + 1) - 3) (3 ^ (2 ^ (j - i)) - 3) := h₁₁
            _ = 1 := h₁₂
        exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h₁₃
      exact h₃
    · exact hmn.elim (fun h => absurd h (lt_irrefl _)) id

use {n : ℕ+ | ∃ k : ℕ, n = ⟨k + 1, Nat.succ_pos k⟩}
  constructor
  · exact Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun k => ⟨k + 1, Nat.succ_pos k⟩) (by simp)
  · intro m hm n hn hmn
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hm
    obtain ⟨l, rfl⟩ := hn
    simp only [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_comm]
    have hkl : k ≠ l := by
      rintro rfl
      simp_all
    wlog hkl' : k < l
    · exact hkl.symm ▸ this (by linarith) hmn
    ·
      have h₁ : 2 ^ (k + 1) - 3 > 0 := by
        apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
        exact Nat.one_lt_pow (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h₂ : 2 ^ (l + 1) - 3 > 0 := by
        apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
        exact Nat.one_lt_pow (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h₃ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l + 1) - 3) = Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) ((2 ^ (l + 1) - 3) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)) := by
        rw [Nat.gcd_mod_left]
      have h₄ : (2 ^ (l + 1) - 3) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) = (2 ^ (l + 1) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) - 3 % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) := by
        rw [Nat.mod_sub_of_lt] <;> try norm_num <;> try linarith
      have h₅ : 2 ^ (k + 1) ≡ 3 [MOD (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)] := by
        rw [Nat.ModEq]
        simp [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h₁]
      have h₆ : 2 ^ (l + 1) ≡ 3 * 2 ^ (l - k) [MOD (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)] := by
        calc
          2 ^ (l + 1) = 2 ^ (k + 1 + (l - k)) := by rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel' (by linarith)]
          _ = 2 ^ (k + 1) * 2 ^ (l - k) := by rw [pow_add]
          _ ≡ 3 * 2 ^ (l - k) [MOD (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)] := by
            apply Nat.ModEq.mul_right
            exact h₅
      have h₇ : (2 ^ (l + 1) - 3) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) = (3 * 2 ^ (l - k) - 3) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) := by
        rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h₂, ← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by positivity)]
        simp [h₆, Nat.ModEq]
      have h₈ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l + 1) - 3) = Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (3 * (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)) := by
        rw [h₃, h₇]
        congr
        ring
      have h₉ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) 3 = 1 := by
        have h₁₀ : 2 ^ (k + 1) % 3 = if (k + 1) % 2 = 0 then 1 else 2 := by
          induction k <;> simp_all [pow_succ, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod]
        have h₁₁ : (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) % 3 = (2 ^ (k + 1) % 3 - 0) % 3 := by
          simp [Nat.mod_sub]
        rw [h₁₁, h₁₀]
        split_ifs <;> simp_all [Nat.gcd_eq_gcd_ab]
      have h₁₀ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) = 1 := by
        have h₁₁ : 2 ^ (k + 1) ≡ 3 [MOD (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3)] := h₅
        have h₁₂ : 2 ^ (l - k) ≡ 1 [MOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)] := by
          apply Nat.ModEq.pow
          apply Nat.ModEq.refl
        have h₁₃ : 3 ≡ 2 ^ (k + 1) [MOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)] := by
          apply Nat.ModEq.symm
          apply Nat.ModEq.of_dvd
          apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
        have h₁₄ : 3 * 2 ^ (l - k) ≡ 2 ^ (k + 1) * 2 ^ (l - k) [MOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)] := by
          apply Nat.ModEq.mul
          exact h₁₃
          exact Nat.ModEq.refl
        have h₁₅ : 2 ^ (k + 1 + (l - k)) = 2 ^ (l + 1) := by
          rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel' (by linarith)]
        rw [← h₁₅] at h₁₄
        have h₁₆ : 3 * 2 ^ (l - k) - 3 ≡ 0 [MOD Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)] := by
          apply Nat.ModEq.sub
          exact h₁₄
          apply Nat.ModEq.refl
        have h₁₇ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) ∣ 3 * (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) := by
          apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
        have h₁₈ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) ∣ 2 ^ (k + 1) - 3 := by
          apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
        have h₁₉ : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) ∣ 3 := by
          calc
            Nat.gcd (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) ∣ 3 * (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) := h₁₇
            _ ∣ 3 * (2 ^ (l - k) - 1) + (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) * 0 := by simp
            _ ∣ 3 := by
              apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
              have h₂₀ : (3 * (2 ^ (l - k) - 1)) % (2 ^ (k + 1) - 3) = 0 := by
                sorry
              sorry
        sorry
      sorry

use {n : ℕ+ | ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) → ∀ m : ℕ+, m < n → ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3))}
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    intro n
    use n + 1
    simp
    intro p hp hdiv m hm
    omega
  · intro m n hmn
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    have h1 := hmn.1
    have h2 := hmn.2
    have h3 := hmn.1
    have h4 := hmn.2
    contrapose! h1
    obtain ⟨d, hd1, hd2, hd3⟩ := Nat.not_coprime_iff_ne_zero_and_exists_dvd.1 h1
    have h5 := h2 d hd1 hd3
    have h6 := h4 d hd1 hd2
    cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne hmn.1 with hlt hgt
    · exact h5 hlt
    · exact h6 hgt

use {n : ℕ+ | ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) → ∀ m : ℕ+, m < n → ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3))}
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    intro n
    use n + 1
    simp
    intro p hp hdiv m hm
    omega
  · intro m n hmn
    have h₁ := hmn.1
    have h₂ := hmn.2
    rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
    intro d hd
    have hdm : d ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
    have hdn : d ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
    cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos d with hd0 hdpos
    · exfalso
      omega
    · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd hdpos
      have hpm : p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3) := dvd_trans hpd hdm
      have hpn : p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) := dvd_trans hpd hdn
      cases' lt_or_gt_of_ne (Ne.symm (Ne_of_lt hmn.1)) with hlt hgt
      · specialize h₁ p hp hpm n hgt
        exact h₁ hpn
      · specialize h₂ p hp hpn m hlt
        exact h₂ hpm

use { n : ℕ+ | ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) → ∀ m : ℕ+, m < n → ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3)) }
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    intro n
    use n + 1
    simp
    intro p hp hdiv m hm
    omega
  · intro m n hmn
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    have h1 := hmn.1
    have h2 := hmn.2
    have h3 : m ≠ n := by
      rintro rfl
      simp_all
    wlog hle : m ≤ n
    · have hlt : m < n := lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm h3)
      specialize h2 _ hlt
      intro p hp hpm hpn
      exact h2 p hp hpn hpm
    · have hlt : n < m := lt_of_le_of_ne hle h3
      specialize h1 _ hlt
      intro p hp hpm hpn
      exact h1 p hp hpm hpn

use {n : ℕ+ | ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) → ∀ m : ℕ+, m < n → ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3))}
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    intro n
    use n + 1
    simp
    intro p hp hdiv m hm
    omega
  · intro m n hmn
    rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
    intro d hd
    have h1 : d ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3) := Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
    have h2 : d ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) := Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _
    cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos d with hd0 hdpos
    · simp_all
    · have hprime : ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ d := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd hdpos
      cases' hprime with p hp
      cases' hp with hp1 hp2
      have h3 : p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3) := dvd_trans hp2 h1
      have h4 : p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) := dvd_trans hp2 h2
      wlog hmn' : m < n
      · exact Or.elim (Nat.lt_trichotomy m n) (fun h => h.elim (fun h => by simp_all) (fun h => by exact h)) (fun h => by exact h)
      · specialize hmn hmn'
        have h5 : ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3)) := hmn p hp1 h4
        contradiction

use {n : ℕ+ | ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ (2 ^ n.val - 3) → ∀ m : ℕ+, m < n → ¬(p ∣ (2 ^ m.val - 3))}

  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem
    intro n

    intro p hp hdiv m hm

    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
    have h1 := hmn.1
    have h2 := hmn.2
    have h3 := hmn.1
    have h4 := hmn.2
    clear hmn
    contrapose! h1
    obtain ⟨d, hd1, hd2, hd3⟩ := Nat.not_coprime_iff_ne_zero_and_exists_dvd.1 h1
